rationale: The citing paper references Dawar and Pillutla (2000) only in a grouped citation in the General Discussion, as an example of prior work on how scandals affect the scandalized brand itself. It is used to position the new paper's contribution (spillover to category and competitors) against existing literature, not to build hypotheses, mechanisms, measures, or analyses from that specific study. Because no distinct functional role for this cited paper is developed beyond background positioning, the citation is best classified as a passing mention.
